Quoted Text: I keep checking my phone because I feel like I will miss something important.
When I write down my thoughts, I notice the same worries repeating.
Talking to my sister helps me calm down after stressful meetings.
I avoid difficult emails until late evening and then feel worse.
If I sleep poorly, everything feels harder the next day.
I started short breathing exercises before presentations and it helps.
I tell myself one mistake means I am failing at everything.
On good days I take a walk first and my mood improves.
I notice tension in my shoulders before I realize I am anxious.
I skipped lunch and then felt irritable in the afternoon.
